Here's a summary of the relevant remote jobs found for your **Python** skills:

**1. Senior Full-stack React Developer** — Lemon.io
- Fully remote (Americas, Europe, Asia, Oceania)
- Python listed in stack alongside many other technologies
- Marketplace connecting devs with US/European startups
- Salary not disclosed
- https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/software-development/senior-full-stack-react-developer-2088711

**2. Senior DevOps Engineer** — Lemon.io
- Fully remote (Americas, Europe, Asia, Oceania)
- Python listed in stack, plus Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, Azure, GCP
- Marketplace connecting engineers with startups
- Salary not disclosed
- https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/devops/senior-devops-engineer-2090002

**3. AI Engineer** — Dry Ground AI
- Fully remote (Brazil, Colombia, Philippines — $40k–$60k)
- Core stack: Python, TensorFlow/PyTorch, NLP, CI/CD, cloud
- Building AI/ML models and agentic systems for clients
- No red flags
- https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/artificial-intelligence/ai-engineer-2089958
